hero.title: Rules & Guidelines
hero.description: We strive to provide the best experience for all our clients. Please review our policies to ensure a smooth and enjoyable visit.

rulesSection.title: Our Commitment to Excellence
rulesSection.subtitle: To provide the highest quality service, we ask all clients to follow these simple guidelines

rules.title: Arrival Time
rules.description: Please arrive 5-10 minutes before your scheduled appointment to check-in and prepare for your service.
rules.details: Late arrivals may result in shortened service time or rescheduling to avoid impacting other clients.

rules.title: Cancellation Policy
rules.description: Cancel or reschedule at least 24 hours before your appointment to avoid charges.
rules.details: Late cancellations or no-shows may incur a fee of 50% of the service price.

rules.title: Children Policy
rules.description: Children under 12 must be accompanied by an adult at all times.
rules.details: For safety reasons, unsupervised children will not be permitted in the service area.

rules.title: Health & Safety
rules.description: All tools are sterilized, and fresh towels are used for each client.
rules.details: If you're feeling unwell, please reschedule your appointment for the safety of our staff and clients.

rules.title: Service Guarantee
rules.description: Not satisfied with your cut? We offer complimentary adjustments within 3 days.
rules.details: Adjustments must be requested within 3 days of your original service date.

rules.title: Payment Methods
rules.description: We accept all major credit cards, cash, and digital payments.
rules.details: A valid credit card is required to hold all appointments.

booking.title: Booking Policy
items: Online booking available 24/7 for your convenience
Credit card required to secure all appointments
Same-day bookings accepted based on availability
No-show or late cancellation fee: 50% of service price

service.title: Service Guidelines
items: Free adjustments within 3 days of service
Hygiene and sanitation protocols strictly followed

faqSection.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqSection.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our policies and services

faqs.question: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.answer: You can book online through our website, call us directly, or visit our shop in person. Online booking is available 24/7.

faqs.question: What if I need to reschedule?
faqs.answer: You can reschedule online up to 24 hours before your appointment. For last-minute changes, please call us directly.

faqs.question: Do you offer group bookings?
faqs.answer: Yes! We accommodate group bookings for parties of 4 or more. Please call ahead to arrange special accommodations.

faqs.question: Are walk-ins welcome?
faqs.answer: Walk-ins are welcome based on availability, but we strongly recommend booking in advance to secure your preferred time.

faqs.question: What's your refund policy?
faqs.answer: We don't offer refunds but provide free adjustments within 3 days if you're not satisfied with your service.

faqs.question: Do you have gift cards?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer digital and physical gift cards in any denomination. Perfect for holidays and special occasions!

importantNotice.title: Important Notice
importantNotice.content: Policies are subject to change without prior notice. Please review our rules periodically for updates.

contactSection.title: Still Have Questions?
contactSection.subtitle: Our team is here to help you with any questions about our policies or services
